title: artocarpus mariannensis
intro: Artocarpus mariannensis, also known as the breadfruit or Marianne's breadfruit, is a species of fruit-bearing tree native to the Pacific Islands. The medicinal properties of Artocarpus mariannensis include its antidiabetic and antioxidant effects, which can help regulate blood sugar levels and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of consuming Artocarpus mariannensis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation in the body. Artocarpus mariannensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
